label: connect
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 connect --solver ls_dyna
output:

    "session_id": "lsdyna-1776151062",

}

label: copy-mesh
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import shutil, os; src=r'E:\simcli\sim-skills\lsdyna\base\workflows\pydyna_taylor_bar' + r'\taylor_bar_mesh.k'; dst=str(workdir / 'taylor_bar_mesh.k'); shutil.copy(src, dst); _result = {'mesh_at': dst, 'size': os.path.getsize(dst)}

label: title
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.title = 'Taylor Bar 鈥?sim CLI session E2E'

label: material
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec mat = kwd.Mat003(mid=1); mat.ro = 7.85e-9; mat.e = 150000.0; mat.pr = 0.34; mat.sigy = 390.0; mat.etan = 90.0; deck.append(mat)

label: section
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec sec = kwd.SectionSolid(secid=1); sec.elform = 1; deck.append(sec)

label: part
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import pandas as pd; part = kwd.Part(); part.parts = pd.DataFrame({'pid': [1], 'mid': [1], 'secid': [1]}); deck.append(part)

label: coord-system
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec cs = kwd.DefineCoordinateSystem(cid=1); cs.xl = 1.0; cs.yp = 1.0; deck.append(cs)

label: initial-velocity
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec iv = kwd.InitialVelocityGeneration(); iv.id = 1; iv.styp = 2; iv.vy = 300e3; iv.icid = 1; deck.append(iv)

label: define-box
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec box = kwd.DefineBox(boxid=1, xmn=-500, xmx=500, ymn=39.0, ymx=40.1, zmn=-500, zmx=500); deck.append(box)

label: node-set
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec ns = kwd.SetNodeGeneral(); ns.sid = 1; ns.option = 'BOX'; ns.e1 = 1; deck.append(ns)

label: rigid-wall
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec rw = kwd.RigidwallPlanar(id=1); rw.nsid = 1; rw.yt = 40.1; rw.yh = 39.0; deck.append(rw)

label: control-termination
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.append(kwd.ControlTermination(endtim=8.0e-5, dtmin=0.001))

label: database-outputs
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec dt_out = 8.0e-8; deck.extend([kwd.DatabaseGlstat(dt=dt_out, binary=3), kwd.DatabaseMatsum(dt=dt_out, binary=3), kwd.DatabaseNodout(dt=dt_out, binary=3), kwd.DatabaseElout(dt=dt_out, binary=3), kwd.DatabaseRwforc(dt=dt_out, binary=3), kwd.DatabaseBinaryD3Plot(dt=4.0e-6)])

label: include-mesh
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.append(kwd.Include(filename='taylor_bar_mesh.k'))

label: inspect-deck
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect deck.summary
output:
{
  "ok": true,
  "title": "Taylor Bar \u9225?sim CLI session E2E",

  ],

  "has_material": true
}

label: export-deck
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.export_file(str(workdir / 'taylor_bar.k'))

label: inspect-files-before-solve
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect workdir.files

label: solve
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec run_dyna('taylor_bar.k', working_directory=str(workdir), stream=False)
output:

label: inspect-files-after-solve
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect workdir.files

label: inspect-results
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect results.summary

label: extract-kinetic-energy
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec gke_op = dpf.operators.result.global_kinetic_energy(); gke_op.inputs.data_sources.connect(_data_sources); ke = gke_op.eval().get_field(0).data; _result = {'ke_initial': float(ke[0]), 'ke_max': float(max(ke)), 'ke_final': float(ke[-1]), 'n_states': len(ke)}

label: extract-internal-energy
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec gie_op = dpf.operators.result.global_internal_energy(); gie_op.inputs.data_sources.connect(_data_sources); ie = gie_op.eval().get_field(0).data; _result = {'ie_initial': float(ie[0]), 'ie_max': float(max(ie)), 'ie_final': float(ie[-1])}

label: extract-displacement
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import numpy as np; disp_op = model.results.displacement.on_last_time_freq(); disp_field = disp_op.eval().get_field(0); disp_arr = np.asarray(disp_field.data).reshape(-1, 3); norms = np.linalg.norm(disp_arr, axis=1); _result = {'max_disp_mm': float(norms.max()), 'mean_disp_mm': float(norms.mean()), 'n_nodes': int(disp_arr.shape[0])}

label: render-pngs
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import subprocess, sys, json; r = subprocess.run([sys.executable, r'E:\simcli\sim-skills\lsdyna\base\workflows\pydyna_taylor_bar/scripts/render_evidence.py', str(workdir)], capture_output=True, text=True); _result = {'returncode': r.returncode, 'stdout_tail': r.stdout[-500:], 'stderr_tail': r.stderr[-500:]}

label: disconnect
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 disconnect
